mapper.select: select m.id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_id, m.message_type, m.content_json, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at, m.deleted_at, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.avatar_url as sender_avatar_url from cook_messages m left join cook_users u on u.id = m.sender_id and u.deleted_at is null where m.id = #{id} and m.deleted_at is null limit 1

select m.id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_id, m.message_type, m.content_json, m.status, m.created_at, m.updated_at, m.deleted_at, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.avatar_url as sender_avatar_url from cook_messages m left join cook_users u on u.id = m.sender_id and u.deleted_at is null where m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} and m.deleted_at is null order by m.created_at asc, m.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into cook_messages (conversation_id, sender_id, message_type, content_json, status) values (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{messageType}, #{contentJson}, #{status})
